title: Daily Build Update: Publication workflow and commit gating tightened
summary: Cleaned the portfolio repo baseline, improved Luna's ability to recover approved export state, and tightened commit gating so publication can move forward with less manual confusion.
impact: Reduced friction in the outward publication path and made commit-readiness easier to trust.

title: Daily Build Update: Portfolio reporting checkpoint
summary: A public-safe checkpoint exported from Luna capturing the current reporting cadence, momentum state, and next move for the portfolio workflow.
impact: Keeps the public build log active even when a day does not produce a large outward-safe milestone.

title: Daily Build Update: Luna reporting connected to public publication
summary: Built Luna's first end-to-end portfolio export workflow with public-safe bundle generation, staged review/apply flow, and outward publication structure.
impact: Established the first repeatable path from internal daily reporting to public-facing publication.

title: Site content structure prepared for export-driven updates
summary: Established the first file-driven posts path for the portfolio site so future updates can be added through exported content instead of homepage-only edits.
impact: Created the homepage feed contract that future outward-safe posts can keep using.

title: Daily Build Update: Early portfolio checkpoint
summary: Progress update exported from Luna to keep the first public build log cadence active while the workflow was still being formed.
impact: Shows that outward publication can capture incremental progress, not just big launches.
